docket_entries.description: ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN-KAN, OANH TUICO, GINA M. HEARING SET FOR DEC-18-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER NGUYEN-KAN, OANH
DECREE CHANGING NAME DECREE CHANGING NAME OF OANH NGUYEN-KAN TO JASMINE KAN AND MINOR CHILDS NAME FROM GINA M. TUICO TO GINA NGUYEN. FILED BY PETITIONER NGUYEN-KAN, OANH TUICO, GINA M.
MINUTES FOR DEC-18-2001 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2001, ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER AS TWO INDIVIDUALS. OANH NGUYEN-KAN TO BE JASMINE KAN. MINOR DAUGHER GINA M. TUICO TO BE GINA NGUYEN.
PROOF OF PUBLICATION (ASIAN WEEK) THE PROPOSED NAME CHANGE WAS PUBLISHED APPROPRIATELY FOR FOUR WEEKS SEQUENTIALLY, GIVING NOTICE TO ANY PERSONS POTENTIALLY OBJECTING TO THE CHANGE OF NAME PETITION.
